---
title: "Data & Outputs"
toc: true
---

The EUR_DATA collection provides structured, analysis-ready datasets on European
political institutions. Each dataset is released with reproducible pipeline code,
a column-level codebook, and a test suite. All data is licensed
[CC-BY-4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/).

## Commission Formation (2024-2029)

The formation of the second von der Leyen Commission, from the June 2024
European Parliament elections to the adoption of the 2025 Commission Work
Programme. Six interlinked tables, all keyed on a three-letter `commissioner_id`.

| Table | Rows | What it captures |
|-------|-----:|------------------|
| `commissioners` | 27 | The College: portfolio, party, gender, and DG assignments |
| `mission_letter_commitments` | 721 | Policy commitments from 26 presidential mission letters |
| `hearings` | 26 | Confirmation hearing dates, committees, and outcomes |
| `investiture_vote` | 688 | MEP-level roll-call votes on the College (27 Nov 2024) |
| `work_programme_items` | 113 | Items from the four annexes of the CWP 2025 |
| `formation_timeline` | 13 | Key institutional milestones (250-day span) |

**Downloads:**
[commissioners](https://github.com/Connected-Politics-Lab/EUR_DATA/blob/main/datasets/commission_formation/data/output/commissioners.csv) ·
[commitments](https://github.com/Connected-Politics-Lab/EUR_DATA/blob/main/datasets/commission_formation/data/output/mission_letter_commitments.csv) ·
[hearings](https://github.com/Connected-Politics-Lab/EUR_DATA/blob/main/datasets/commission_formation/data/output/hearings.csv) ·
[investiture_vote](https://github.com/Connected-Politics-Lab/EUR_DATA/blob/main/datasets/commission_formation/data/output/investiture_vote.csv) ·
[work_programme_items](https://github.com/Connected-Politics-Lab/EUR_DATA/blob/main/datasets/commission_formation/data/output/work_programme_items.csv) ·
[formation_timeline](https://github.com/Connected-Politics-Lab/EUR_DATA/blob/main/datasets/commission_formation/data/output/formation_timeline.csv)

Every table is also available as XLSX in the same
[folder](https://github.com/Connected-Politics-Lab/EUR_DATA/tree/main/datasets/commission_formation/data/output).

**Documentation:**
[Dataset README](https://github.com/Connected-Politics-Lab/EUR_DATA/blob/main/datasets/commission_formation/README.md) ·
[Codebook](https://github.com/Connected-Politics-Lab/EUR_DATA/blob/main/datasets/commission_formation/CODEBOOK.md)

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
A citable DOI for this dataset is minted via Zenodo on each release. The DOI
will appear here once the first release is published.
:::

### Explore the data

The charts below are interactive: hover for exact values.

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
voteData = FileAttachment("assets/charts/vote_by_group.csv").csv({typed: true})
commitData = FileAttachment("assets/charts/commitments_by_commissioner.csv").csv({typed: true})
annexData = FileAttachment("assets/charts/wp_by_annex.csv").csv({typed: true})
timelineData = FileAttachment("assets/charts/timeline.csv").csv({typed: true})
```

#### Investiture vote by EP political group

The Parliament approved the College by 370 votes to 282, with 36 abstentions.
The chart shows how each political group split.

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
Plot.plot({
  marginLeft: 70,
  marginBottom: 40,
  x: {label: "MEPs", grid: true},
  y: {label: null, domain: [...new Set(voteData.map(d => d.ep_party_group))]},
  color: {domain: ["for", "against", "abstain"], range: ["#2c7fb8", "#d73027", "#969696"], legend: true},
  marks: [
    Plot.barX(voteData, {
      y: "ep_party_group",
      x: "count",
      fill: "vote",
      order: ["for", "against", "abstain"],
      tip: true
    }),
    Plot.ruleX([0])
  ]
})
```

#### Mission-letter commitments per commissioner

721 commitments were extracted from the 26 mission letters: 440 high-confidence
(from bullet-point lists) and 281 medium-confidence (from directive sentences and
legislative references).

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
Plot.plot({
  marginLeft: 150,
  marginBottom: 40,
  width: 800,
  height: 560,
  x: {label: "Commitments", grid: true},
  y: {label: null, sort: {y: "x", reduce: "sum", reverse: true}},
  color: {domain: ["high", "medium"], range: ["#1a9850", "#a6d96a"], legend: true},
  marks: [
    Plot.barX(commitData, {
      y: "commissioner_name",
      x: "count",
      fill: "confidence",
      order: ["high", "medium"],
      tip: true
    }),
    Plot.ruleX([0])
  ]
})
```

#### Commission Work Programme 2025 by annex

113 items across the four annexes of the work programme adopted on 11 February 2025.

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
Plot.plot({
  marginLeft: 180,
  marginBottom: 40,
  x: {label: "Items", grid: true},
  y: {label: null, domain: annexData.map(d => d.label)},
  marks: [
    Plot.barX(annexData, {y: "label", x: "count", fill: "#542788", tip: true}),
    Plot.text(annexData, {y: "label", x: "count", text: "count", dx: 12, fontWeight: "bold"}),
    Plot.ruleX([0])
  ]
})
```

#### Formation timeline

From the European Parliament elections (6 June 2024) to the adoption of the
Commission Work Programme (11 February 2025).

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
Plot.plot({
  marginLeft: 40,
  marginRight: 20,
  marginBottom: 50,
  height: 200,
  x: {label: null, type: "utc", grid: true},
  color: {legend: true, label: "Event type"},
  marks: [
    Plot.ruleY([0]),
    Plot.dot(timelineData, {
      x: d => new Date(d.date),
      y: 0,
      fill: "event_type",
      r: 6,
      tip: {format: {x: true, y: false}},
      channels: {event: "event_name", institution: "institution"}
    })
  ]
})
```

*More datasets will be added as the project develops.*
